entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume used for commercial hybrid seed technology based on cytoplasmic male sterility

entities.name: CYTOPLASMIC MALE STERILITY
entities.description: A condition where pollen is non-functional due to cytoplasmic factors

entities.name: ORF147
entities.description: A novel open reading frame identified from the A4 cytoplasm of Cajanus cajanifolius

entities.name: A4 CYTOPLASM
entities.description: A specific cytoplasm from Cajanus cajanifolius associated with CMS

entities.name: CAJANUS CAJANIFOLIUS
entities.description: A wild relative of pigeonpea from which the A4 cytoplasm was derived

entities.name: ARABIDOPSIS THALIANA
entities.description: A model plant used to test the induction of male sterility by orf147

entities.name: NICOTIANA TABACUM
entities.description: Tobacco plant used to test the induction of male sterility by orf147

entities.name: ESCHERICHIA COLI
entities.description: A bacterium used to demonstrate the toxicity of orf147

entities.name: MALE STERILITY
entities.description: The inability of a plant to produce functional pollen

entities.name: ABERRANT FLORAL DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: Abnormal development of floral organs associated with male sterility

entities.name: REDUCED LIGNIN CONTENT
entities.description: Lower levels of lignin in the anthers of male sterile plants

entities.name: ANTHER BIOGENESIS GENES
entities.description: Genes responsible for the development and formation of anthers

entities.name: MONOLIGNOL BIOSYNTHESIS GENES
entities.description: Genes involved in the production of monolignols for lignin synthesis

entities.name: RETROGRADE SIGNALING
entities.description: Communication from the mitochondria to the nucleus regulating gene expression

entities.name: CYTOTOXICITY
entities.description: The quality of being toxic to cells, induced by orf147

entities.name: PROGRAMMED CELL DEATH
entities.description: A regulated process of cell self-destruction induced by orf147

entities.name: HYBRID SEED TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: Agricultural technology used to produce hybrid seeds

entities.name: HYBRID VIGOR
entities.description: The improved performance of hybrid offspring

entities.name: GENE EXPRESSION STUDIES
entities.description: Analysis used to confirm the down-regulation of specific genes

entities.name: CLONING
entities.description: The process used to isolate and identify the orf147 sequence
